mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0304-01_2#Sql001 */ INTO DEPOSIT_TRANSFER( DEPOSIT_TRANSFER_NO , BUTEN_CODE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , CURRENCY_CODE , TRANSFER_DATE , DEPOSIT_TRANSFER_TYPE , TRANSFER_AMOUNT , API_ERROR_CODE , API_STATUS_CODE , API_MESSAGE , CREATE_TIME , CREATE_USER , UPDATE_TIME , UPDATE_USER ) VALUES( TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_DEPOSIT_TRANSFER.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') , #{req.butenCode} , TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) , #{req.currencyCode} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.entrustDepositTransferClassification} , TO_NUMBER(#{req.destinationAmount}) , null , null , null , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.userId} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.userId} )
